theme_strategy.rationale: Developer-focused admin portal needs a high-contrast, technical dark mode to reduce glare during long sessions. Utilizing Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for a modern, code-editor aesthetic.

headings.rules: Used for all headings, key numerical data, and technical labels. Must use tracking-tight for larger sizes. Avoid bold by default—use black or regular weights to create distinct contrast.

body.rules: Used for body copy, paragraphs, list items, and standard reading text. Maintains clinical legibility for dense admin data.

colors.rules: Never use pure #000 or #FFF. Text contrast must exceed WCAG AA minimums. Accent colors should be used minimally, leaning on Cyber Yellow (#EAB308) for primary actions (e.g., Nova Chatbot CTA) to draw developer attention. NO purple/violet gradients. NO full-screen gradients.

rules: Use sharp 1px borders (border-white/10) for grids and cards to expose the skeleton.
Cards should have 0px to 4px border radius. Achieve an extremely sharp, technical look.
Never use center-alignment for layouts unless it is an explicit hero section. Left-align for better scannability.
Containers must use generous internal padding (p-6, p-8).
Grid items must be direct children of grid containers.
Header MUST have a solid background or heavy glass (bg-black/90). DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds for headers/overlays.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders (The Technical Look) - 1px solid borders with subtle grid lines.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Crisp highlight with explicit text color changes. Never rely on inheritance. E.g., hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Avoid in data-heavy screens to preserve optical clarity. If necessary for sticky elements, use high opacity (bg-black/90) with heavy backdrop-blur-xl and a crisp 1px border. DO NOT use transparent dropdown backgrounds.

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none). High contrast hover states. Use 'Cyber Yellow' strictly for the Nova integration CTA.
components.inputs: Flat design with 1px borders. Focus rings must be explicit and high contrast (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none).
components.tables: Dense layout, strict 1px border lines. Left-aligned data. No soft shadows.
components.chat_ui: Awwwards-minimalist. Remove traditional rounded 'bubble' tails. Use structured rectangular blocks with clear sender/timestamp metadata.
components.navigation: Sidebar navigation for admin tools. Must have solid background (bg-zinc-950) with 1px right border.
components.toasts: Use Sonner component (sonner.tsx). Position at bottom-right, sharp edges, dark theme.

icons_and_assets.rules: Use thin stroke widths (1.5px) for a technical feel. Avoid generic emojis (🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯).

rules: Use staggered entrance animations for table rows and chat messages.
Avoid 'transition: all'. Explicitly define transition properties (e.g., transition-colors, transition-transform).
Micro-interactions on hover (slight translate-y, border color shift).
Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text.
Explicit focus states on all interactive elements.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

GENERAL_UI_UX_DESIGN_GUIDELINES: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and crisp 1px borders, avoiding soft blurred drop shadows.
Do not apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements excluding transforms.
Do not center align the app container. Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the CSS file. This disrupts human natural reading flow.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations separate good from extraordinary.
instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Share the guideline and code implementations for .js files (JSX), NOT .tsx files.
1. Setup fonts by importing JetBrains Mono and IBM Plex Sans into index.css. Apply to Tailwind config.
2. Update tailwind.config.js to enforce the strict dark theme colors and sharp border radii.
3. Build Login Screen: Minimalist terminal-style centered card. Credentials (admin / ilovecookies4) should grant access.
4. Build Admin Dashboard with Sidebar. Include prominent 'Nova Chatbot' button (in Cyber Yellow) navigating to the /nova route.
5. Build Users Management page: Data-dense Shadcn-style table with full CRUD functionality, role toggles, and sharp 1px borders.
6. Build Real-time Chat page: Sidebar user list, right-pane message view. Sharp chat bubbles, no generic tails.
7. Build /nova Placeholder Page: A technical, welcoming 'drop your AI code here' screen.
8. Build Profile/Settings page to allow password changes.
9. Ensure sticky headers/navs use solid or heavy blurred backgrounds. NO transparent headers.
10. Add data-testid to every button, link, and input.
